name: camp_landing
_comment: User 2026-06-08 (#34): returning from a city lands here by plane. 2026-06-20 #18: the exit is now UP the dirt road to the gate at the right (hotspot center 1194,303), not a side 'right' arrow. minY lowered to 295 so PP can walk up the receding road toward the gate; the camp_landing->camp_grounds exit in game.go walks him along the road waypoints. spawnY=420 -> foot ~690 by the plane.

hotspots._comment: #18: arrow UP to the camp; center (1194,303) at the gate arch on the right. bounds 1106,93 + 176x420 -> center (1194,303).
hotspots.name: To the Camp

_comment_walk: #18: the dirt road, as CENTER lines (foot=y+135), from the foreground up-right to the gate. F3-verify against the painted road.
